avatar.label: A style-conscious self-purchaser who wants one unmistakable look and a personal scent finishing step
avatar.purchase_moment: getting ready for a social plan where one visible statement piece and one personal scent can complete the look

pains.text: A basic outfit can feel unfinished, but adding too many competing details makes getting ready harder.
A fragrance purchase can disappoint when the scent feels weak or unclear.

desires.text: She wants the trousers people ask about and a scent that feels deliberately chosen for the same moment.
She wants one clear size decision before she checks out.

objections.text: Will the fragrance feel distinct enough to become part of getting ready?
Which size makes sense for her waist?

language_cues.text: How do I buy a pair?

copy.announcement: Choose Auralo Pheromone Perfume for $29 and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.eyebrow: The pants they notice. The scent you chose for the moment.
copy.headline: Sprinkle Tweed Pants — FREE With Your $29 Auralo Pheromone Perfume Purchase.
copy.subheadline: One cream multicoloured-tweed statement pair. One floral-amber finishing step. Both in the same getting-ready decision.
copy.bridge_heading: The look catches the eye. Your scent completes the moment.
copy.bridge_body: Let the textured trousers carry the visible drama, then make Auralo the final two-or-three-drop step before you leave. You get the scent and the exact pants you wanted in one $29 decision.
desire_questions: Imagine walking in wearing the pair they notice—and leaving the scent they remember?*
What if the pants make him look—and your scent becomes the detail he keeps thinking about?*
What if your scent becomes his new weakness?*
Could one scent change the chemistry of the entire night?*
Picture this: the outfit already says everything before you add the final drops?*
What if he notices you before he understands why?*
copy.story_heading: First they see the texture. Then the finishing step becomes yours.
copy.story_intro: This is not about piling on more. It is about choosing one visible statement and one personal finishing detail—then knowing exactly what arrives.

story.heading: The pair that refuses to disappear into the outfit
story.body: The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems. Wear them with a simple top and let every distinctive detail do its work.

story.heading: The transaction is deliberately simple
story.body: Auralo Pheromone Perfume costs $29. Sprinkle Tweed Pants is FREE with the qualifying $29 purchase. Choose the perfume and claim the exact statement pair at the same time.

story.heading: Looking dressed is not always feeling finished
story.body: You can have the top, the shoes, and the trousers right—and still feel like the getting-ready moment stopped one detail too soon. This pairing turns that last detail into a deliberate finishing step.

story.heading: Meet the invisible finishing detail
story.body: Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume. It is the personal scent step you add after the visible look is already working.

story.heading: Because vague fragrance is not enough
story.body: Real fragrance shoppers ask whether a perfume sits close to the skin and worry about weak scent. Here, the format, notes, and application are stated clearly so you can decide from facts rather than hype.

story.heading: A floral-amber profile with contrast
story.body: The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper. Floral notes meet fruit, soft sweetness, and peppery contrast in the same composition.

story.heading: Your final step before the door
story.body: Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows. Make those few drops the moment your outfit shifts from dressed to deliberately finished.

story.heading: Start with what is actually verified
story.body: Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume. The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper. Those are the facts; the anticipation belongs to you.

story.heading: What if the anticipation is part of the pleasure?
story.body: Scent can frame a moment without controlling another person. Choose Auralo for its floral-amber character and let every imagined possibility remain a possibility—not a promised reaction.

story.heading: One getting-ready story, not two random products
story.body: The trousers create the visible first impression. Auralo becomes the intimate final detail. Together they turn a simple top, a statement texture, and a chosen scent into one intentional way to leave the house.

story.heading: The FREE reward is the piece you already wanted
story.body: The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit. The silhouette keeps the styling easy while the tweed, flecks, drawcord, and fringe carry the visual interest.

story.heading: Choose your size before you claim the pair
story.body: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem. Auralo is the $29 purchase; the Sprinkle Tweed Pants are included FREE. Ships within 4 days.

story.heading: Know the care and reassurance upfront
story.body: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it. Your purchase also includes 90-day returns and a Five-year warranty.

story.heading: Choose the scent. Claim the design.
story.body: Make Auralo your final getting-ready step for $29 and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE. Pick your size, review the terms, and take both products into the same moment.

copy.offer_heading: Everything that arrives with your $29 purchase
copy.offer_body: You receive Auralo Pheromone Perfume as the $29 purchase and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE, plus the stated shipping, return, and warranty terms.
copy.final_heading: Make the scent yours. Claim the pants FREE.
copy.final_body: Choose your pants size, add the 15 ml Auralo floral-amber finishing step, and complete your $29 purchase with both products included.
copy.faq_heading: Know exactly what you are choosing

proof_sections.paid_heading: Auralo begins where the outfit ends
proof_sections.paid_body: A 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume with a clearly stated scent profile and two-or-three-drop pulse-point step.
proof_sections.free_heading: The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are FREE
proof_sections.free_body: Cream multicoloured-fleck tweed, a braided drawcord, fringed hems, and a relaxed baggy fit give the pair its unmistakable design.
proof_sections.relationship_heading: Let the pants lead the look. Let Auralo finish the moment.
proof_sections.relationship_body: One product creates the visible statement; the other becomes the personal scent step before you leave.
proof_sections.decision_heading: One $29 Auralo purchase. The pants come FREE.
proof_sections.decision_body: Choose XS-S, M, or L-XL, then review the four-day shipping, 90-day returns, and Five-year warranty.

faq.question: What exactly is included?
faq.answer: Auralo Pheromone Perfume is the $29 purchase, and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants are included FREE.

faq.question: What does Auralo smell like?
faq.answer: The scent profile combines jasmine, blackcurrant bud, panna cotta, peony, rose, and pink pepper.

faq.question: How do I apply Auralo?
faq.answer: Apply two or three drops to pulse points such as the wrists, behind the ears, neck, and inner elbows.

faq.question: Does pheromone-inspired perfume guarantee a reaction?
faq.answer: No. Auralo is a 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume; another person's response is not guaranteed.

faq.question: What do the pants look like?
faq.answer: The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

faq.question: How do the pants fit?
faq.answer: The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.

faq.question: Which size should I choose?
faq.answer: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.

faq.question: How long are the pants?
faq.answer: The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

faq.question: How should I care for the pants?
faq.answer: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.

faq.question: What are the return and warranty terms?
